title: Goderich Beachside Rapid
description:
Location: Knights of Columbus – Main Hall (Goderich Columbus Convention Centre & Banquet Hall) 390 Parsons Court, Goderich, ON 
 
 Time Control: 15 minutes + 10 seconds increment per move. 
 
 This tournament will be CFC Rated (quick time control), and is a 5 round tournament. 
 
 Round Schedule: Round 1: 10:00 AM Round 2: 11:00 AM Round 3: 1:00 PM Round 4: 2:00 PM Round 5: 3:00 PM 
 
 Forfeit Time: 5 minutes 
 
 Sections: Open and U1700 
 
 Entry Fee: $20 and a CFC Membership is required.

title: Library Closed - No Club Meeting
description: Goderich Library is closed for the Labour Day holiday. See you the following Tuesday!
